title: Dirm Sword
description: This Resource Pack adds several rename swords. Namely, katana, sword, scythe, small scythe and rapier.
body:
Rename the sword to "Sticker" to get a rapier. If you take it in your left hand it will sheathed.\
Rename the sword to "Tobi Pizda" to get a mini scythe. If you take it in your left hand, it will be upside down.\
Rename the sword to "Smerti228" to get the scythe. If you take it in your left hand, it will be on your back.\
Rename the sword to "Grishalibur" to get a beautiful sword. If you take it in your left hand, it will be on your back.\
Rename the sword to "Ymizara" to get a katana. If you take it in your left hand, it will be sheathed
